# This file is generated by the publisher script in the private AwowLab
# repo. Edits made here are overwritten on the next sync; development
# happens in the private repo (see the Contributing section of README.md).

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.12)
project(Database LANGUAGES CXX)

add_library(Database STATIC
    AbsorbDatabase.cpp
    AuraDatabase.cpp
    AvoidanceDatabase.cpp
    CombatDatabase.cpp
    CombatDatabase/Aggregators.cpp
    CombatDatabase/DamageTakenQueries.cpp
    CombatDatabase/RankingQueries.cpp
    CombatDatabase/TimeSeriesQueries.cpp
    DispelDatabase.cpp
)

target_include_directories(Database
    PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..  # For Core/StringInterner.h access
        ${RAPIDJSON_INCLUDE_DIRS}       # RapidJSON for the settings serializers that
                                        # link against Database (UnifiedSettings,
                                        # MobWeightSettings, PhaseSettings, SpellGroupSettings)
)

# Database depends on Parser for SpellDamageEvent, SwingDamageEvent, etc.
target_link_libraries(Database PUBLIC Parser)

# Precompiled header (base PCH without Vulkan/ImGui)
target_precompile_headers(Database PRIVATE
    "$<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../pch_base.h>"
)

set_target_properties(Database PROPERTIES
    UNITY_BUILD ON
    UNITY_BUILD_BATCH_SIZE 8
)
